creator: hgoldste@bbs.mpcs.com
text:
The base system ships with isc-dhcp, but isc-dhcp is not usable without
a free bpf device for each dhcp/bootpable interface.  It'd be neat if 
GENERIC shipped with even one bpf device, both to aid bootstrapping a
custom kernel off of a separate (but reachable only through a dhpc'd
interface) fast build box and also to leave an active bpf line in 
the config file many use as a model to create their own kernel conf from.

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to run dhclient on a GENERIC kernel :-)
